name: Bill Baraban's Academy ForeGolf
address: 3690 Burnette Park Dr A, Suwanee, GA 30024
about: Bill Baraban's Academy ForeGolf is a premium golf training facility and club fitting center. They offer individually tailored lessons and professional club fitting services using Trackman technology and 30+ years of expertise. The academy caters to golfers of all ages and skill levels, with a focus on serious game improvement and data-driven club fitting.
why_golfers_like_it: Expert club fitting using Trackman data for optimal performance
30+ years of PGA Master Professional instruction
Club agnostic fitting approach focused on best results regardless of brand
Individually tailored lessons for golfers aged 6 to 88

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor used for club fitting and swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the facility offers professional club fitting services to help you find the perfect clubs for your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted at the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify typical playing times for 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility explicitly states they work with clients as young as 6 years old, making it kid-friendly.
